description: Backtrace will reject exploratory findings at parse time. Backtrace validates first element against GapFinding fields (classification, category, description, evidence, suggested_fix). ExploratoryFinding has none of these except description. T016(c) acknowledges risk but this is a known integration failure, not a verification gap.
evidence: Backtrace Section 4 validates GapFinding fields. ExploratoryFinding has severity/reproduction/expected/actual/spec_gap. Auto-detect glob .*-findings.json matches .exploratory-findings.json.
suggested_fix: Add plan note that backtrace cannot consume exploratory findings. T016(c) should produce follow-up task on backtrace to make parser schema-aware.

description: T011 omits the empty/whitespace-only response case that FR-009 specifies as the first parsing case. An implementer following T011 literally would not handle it.
evidence: FR-009 lists 5 cases starting with empty/whitespace. T011 lists only 4 (no empty/whitespace).
suggested_fix: Add empty/whitespace case to T011 as first parsing case.

description: FR-012 uses bare git diff --name-only (no revision). Misses staged modifications. Gap-audit spec finding #1 flagged this but backtrace auditor rejected the fix (breaks consistency with gap-audit/backtrace which use same bare form).
evidence: FR-012 and T010 both use bare git diff --name-only. Backtrace auditor rejected fix: 'changing only this extension breaks boilerplate consistency (SC-004)'.
suggested_fix: Document as conscious decision: bare git diff matches gap-audit/backtrace convention. Accept limitation.

description: T006 does not reference the spec.md missing error case. T005 validates existence, T006 reads. Validation happens before read but T006 doesn't note this.
evidence: T005 validates spec.md existence. T006 reads spec.md without referencing the error case.
suggested_fix: Add note to T006: spec.md existence already validated in Section 3.

description: Source field injection (FR-010) only applies to persistence path (--output). Displayed findings don't have source field. Spec scopes it correctly ('before writing to JSON').
evidence: FR-010: 'before writing to JSON'. T012 handles it. T013 display path doesn't include source.
suggested_fix: Accept as-is. Source is persistence-only by spec design.

description: T009 component 13 (compile failure as finding) comes from edge cases section, not FR-007. Implicit mapping.
evidence: FR-007 lists 12 components. T009 adds component 13 from edge cases section.
suggested_fix: Add cross-reference: 'Per edge case #2 in spec.md.'

description: Contract sets additionalProperties: false but subagent prompt doesn't instruct against extra fields. Subagent could add fields that fail contract validation.
evidence: contracts/exploratory-findings.json: additionalProperties: false. T009 component 9 references data-model.md which doesn't mention the constraint.
suggested_fix: Add to T009: instruct subagent to return ONLY specified fields.

description: T012 says 'validate with jq' but doesn't include FR-011's validation failure warning message or do-not-delete instruction.
evidence: FR-011: specific warning text and do-not-delete. T012: only 'validate with jq'.
suggested_fix: Add FR-011 failure behavior to T012.
